The Central Government hereby nominates Sh. Doulat Jain, Member to be the Vice Chairman of the Animal Welfare Board of India as per Sub- section (3) of Section 5 of the aforesaid Act, in place of Dr. V. N. Appaji Rao. [F.No.ll/ll/2007-AWD] HEM PANDE,Jt. Secy. Note: The earlier notification regarding reconstitution of the Animal Welfare Board of India was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 2005(E), dated 29-11-2007. 5040 GI/2008 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
